title: Chat Timestamps
description: Adds a timestamp to every received chat message :3 Made for new versions!
body:
![Chat Timestamps showcase in chat!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4b2452b1fe63494cc92c335bd5a6ea2dcd6259f.png)

Chat Timestamps adds a timestamp before every message in chat. The timestamps are configurable. You can use "Easy Configuration" from [this website](https://jamescoalchiportfolio.github.io/ChatTimestamps/) to easily configure the timestamps.
You can configure the color of the timestamps (eg. GRAY or #AAAAAA) and their formatting (eg. HH:mm:ss:ms)

### Supported
Chat Timestamps is available for fabric 1.21
